# docs.21.dev

> API documentation for the swift-secp256k1 Swift package — DocC-generated HTML reference with search and source links, plus LLM-optimized markdown files for the P256K and ZKP modules.

This subdomain serves DocC-generated documentation for the swift-secp256k1 package. It includes both interactive HTML pages and co-located markdown files for LLM consumption.

Things to know about this documentation:

- HTML pages are rendered client-side by Swift-DocC-Render, a Vue.js single-page application that reads JSON data produced by Swift-DocC — there is no backend server
- Navigation uses DocC's standard sidebar with type hierarchies and symbol search
- Source links in the DocC HTML point to exact line numbers in the GitHub repository
- Markdown files are co-located at /data/documentation/*.md — plain CommonMark with no JavaScript, ideal for LLM consumption
- Each markdown symbol file contains: type information, Swift declaration, abstract, overview, and related topics

## Documentation (HTML)

- [Getting Started](https://docs.21.dev/documentation/p256k/gettingstarted): How to generate keys, create ECDSA and Schnorr signatures, and perform ECDH key agreement with swift-secp256k1
- [P256K Module](https://docs.21.dev/documentation/p256k/): Elliptic curve cryptography — key generation, ECDSA signing, ECDH key agreement, public key recovery
- [Context](https://docs.21.dev/documentation/p256k/p256k/context): secp256k1 context management and side-channel protection via base point blinding
- [ZKP Module](https://docs.21.dev/documentation/zkp/): Zero-knowledge proofs — Pedersen commitments, range proofs, Schnorr signatures

## Documentation (Markdown — LLM-optimized)

- [P256K Module Overview](https://docs.21.dev/data/documentation/p256k.md): Elliptic curve cryptography — key generation, ECDSA signing, ECDH key agreement, public key recovery
- [ZKP Module Overview](https://docs.21.dev/data/documentation/zkp.md): Zero-knowledge proofs — Pedersen commitments, range proofs, Schnorr signatures

## Example

- [SharedSecret — HTML](https://docs.21.dev/documentation/p256k/sharedsecret): Interactive DocC page (Vue.js SPA, requires JavaScript to render)
- [SharedSecret — Markdown](https://docs.21.dev/data/documentation/p256k/p256k/signing/sharedsecret.md): Same symbol as plain markdown (LLM-readable without JavaScript)

## Related

- [21.dev llms.txt](https://21.dev/llms.txt): Hub llms.txt with full project context and cross-subdomain links
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/21-DOT-DEV/swift-secp256k1): Swift package source, issues, and releases
